title: Better Swords
description: This simple resource pack modifies the game's swords to make them prettier and slightly smaller.
body:
![All the swords from the "Better Swords" resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4060f65cf10872fe08a7b73876f12d6577ef5500.png)

🗡️ **A fairly simple resource pack that slightly modifies the texture of swords. They are now prettier and slightly smaller.** 

**A resource pack that's just as useful in PvP ⚔️ as it is in simple survival 🌳!**

If this resource pack reaches _**1000 downloads**_, an upgrade of the pack will be released!
